title: Tri-Planetary Atmospheric
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tri-Planetary Atmospheric''' was a company that specialized in storing a variety of gas mixtures used to emulate a variety of [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheres]]. The tanks used could be equipped aboard [[Starship/Legends|starships]] to provide specific [[Species/Legends|species]] that breathed exotic atmospheres with the right air. The tanks could also be used for individual dwellings onboard a ship.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]''
*<!-- 2014-08-14 -->''[[Far Horizons]]''
